purpose: Bounded local QA-driven Lineart v3 follow-up after v2 multiseed QA found clean Lineart control but weaker background and subject-presentation robustness. This retests the previously weak seed 711370003 with tighter natural-window background wording, explicit subject-presentation anchoring, and slightly reduced/shortened ControlNet influence.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: hyperrealistic cinematic editorial portrait of an adult woman, auburn brown hair in a neat swept-back professional style, natural skin texture, realistic fine pores, subtle cheek texture, soft human skin asymmetry, realistic eyes with clean catchlights, clear iris detail, gentle eye fill light, open shadow detail, detailed hair, contour-guided facial composition, coherent facial contours, clean jawline and neck separation, crisp shirt collar boundary, tailored dark blazer over white collared shirt, clothed shoulders, quiet neutral interior office background, softly blurred rectangular window panes behind subject, even diffused daylight, balanced exposure, clean face with no painted marks, lifelike lens rendering
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed skin, beauty filter skin, airbrushed face, porcelain skin, glossy skin, distorted anatomy, extra fingers, missing fingers, deformed hands, crossed eyes, low resolution, blurry, watermark, text, lineart artifacts, ink outlines, harsh black outlines, contour stains, colored blotches, paint marks, over-dark eyes, underexposed eyes, muddy shadows, crushed shadows, diagonal light strip, diagonal bright bar, fluorescent strip, glowing light strips, vertical light bars, window bars dominating background, studio light columns, harsh top-left light beam, male subject, beard, heavy stubble, masculine presentation, smeared jawline, warped collar edge, control map stains, bare shoulders, strapless top, nude, unclothed torso

qa_focus: whether the previous seed 711370003 diagonal light-strip background regression is reduced
whether subject presentation remains aligned with the preferred v2 candidate family
whether lowering and shortening Lineart ControlNet influence preserves clean contour guidance
